description: .klickd v3.0 roundtrip test vectors — save_klickd.py → load_klickd.py
notes: These vectors exercise the full save→load pipeline with Argon2id + JCS AAD.
All 8 vectors must pass for a compliant v3.0 implementation.
Vectors 5-6 are negative: KlickdFormatError expected at save() time.
Vector 8 tests build_system_prompt() injection order (klickd context AT TOP — §12).

vectors.description: Basic roundtrip: ASCII payload, standard passphrase
UTF-8 payload with accented chars and emoji
Ethics block with locked_actions (§18ter) — must be preserved
growth.level=5 with 3 memory_refs (§18 minimum) — must succeed
growth.level=5 with only 1 memory_ref — MUST raise KlickdFormatError at save
ethics.locked_actions is a string (not list) — MUST raise KlickdFormatError at save
vectors.expected_behavior: KlickdFormatError — KLICKD_E_FORMAT: ethics.locked_actions must be a list of strings

vectors.description: Both agent_instructions and user_preferences present — both checked independently (P2 fix)
vectors.expected_behavior: success — both fields preserved and checked independently

vectors.description: build_system_prompt injects klickd context BEFORE base prompt (§12 P0 fix)

payload.user_preferences: I am Alice. Respond in Luxembourgish.

input.base_system_prompt: You are Kai, a helpful tutor.

vectors.expected_behavior: Result starts with '<UserContext>' — klickd context is injected at the TOP
